name: Half Harry Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream softened butter and sugar together.
2. Add egg, molasses, and vanilla; beat until well combined.
3. Combine flour, cinnamon, and baking soda in a separate bowl.
4. Gradually add the dry mixture to the creamed mixture.
5. Stir in oats, raisins, nuts, and coconut.
6. Drop by teaspoonful onto an ungreased cookie sheet.
7. Bake at 350°F until lightly browned, about 12 minutes.
8. Makes 3 dozen or more.
